response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer with a strong background in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages, but his focus has been on full-stack and backend development rather than Java specifically. While he meets many technical requirements, his lack of recent Java experience and limited German proficiency are significant concerns for an entry-level Java Developer role in the insurance sector.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and frameworks
Strong background in software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming)
Demonstrated ability to work on complex architectures and large-scale systems
concerns: No recent or significant Java experience in his professional roles
German language skills are listed as basic, which is a core requirement
Overqualified for an entry-level position, which may lead to job dissatisfaction
